spec_match.rationale: Thoroughly inspects the prototype chain, prototype properties, and worker exposure, providing an excellent, accurate view of FontFaceSet IDL changes.

interactive.rationale: Live prototype walking on load and interactive worker-probing button.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment: it specifically inspects the exact prototype and constructor properties hidden by [LegacyNoInterfaceObject].

edge_cases.rationale: Handles pre-150 Chrome and non-Chrome browsers gracefully with explicit instructions and error handling.

references.rationale: References are available on the parent index page, though adding a see also section here would improve consistency.

design_system.rationale: Consistent with the design system styles, colors, and layout.

openQuestions.title: Add see also section with spec and ChromeStatus links
openQuestions.detail: Add a 'see also' section at the bottom of the prototype inspector page linking to chromestatus.com/feature/5123999844663296 and the CSS Font Loading spec to match the other concepts.
